root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card, trim( sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename ) as prename , trim( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name ) || ' ' || trim( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname ) as memname, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc , ( case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' then 'เงินกู้ฉุกเฉิน' when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' then 'เงินกู้สามัญ' else 'เงินกู้พิเศษ' end ) as loan_type ,
sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract::date as begining_of_contract ,
/*ATM สัญญาเก่า ให้หมดในปี สัญญาในปี ให้หมดในอีก 1 ปี ถ้าไม่ใช่ ATM แต่ วันสิ้นสุดเกิน ปี 2050 ให้ใช้ เริ่มสัญญา + 10000 วัน */
( case when sc_lon_m_rule.atm_status = '1' and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract < sc_acc_m_account_constant.beginning_of_account then sc_acc_m_account_constant.ending_of_account::date when sc_lon_m_rule.atm_status = '1' and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract >= sc_acc_m_account_constant.beginning_of_account then (sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract + interval '365 day')::date when sc_lon_m_rule.atm_status = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract.ending_of_contract > sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract + interval '10000 day' then (sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract + interval '10000 day')::date else sc_lon_m_contract.ending_of_contract::date end ) as ending_of_contract ,
F_LON_GET_INTRATE( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type , current_date) * 100 as loan_int_rate, sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance ,tab2.seq_no FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_acc_m_account_constant ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type
,( select sum(1)over(order by sum_principal_balance desc ) as seq_no /*เทียบเท่า comulative sum ถ้าเอา 50 คน ก้อเอา seq_no <= 50 */ ,membership_no ,sum_principal_balance from ( select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,sum(sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance) as sum_principal_balance from sc_lon_m_loan_card ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no group by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no order by sum_principal_balance desc /*เรียงหนี้รวม จากมากไปหาน้อย*/ ) tab1 ) tab2
WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) ) and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = tab2.membership_no
and tab2.seq_no <= 100 and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type < '03' /*WHERE*/ order by seq_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance desc
